etimesNot Manali, not Switzerland: Karnataka villages see shocking ‘snowfall’, internet stunnedResidents of Kalghatgi and surrounding villages in Karnataka's Dharwad district witnessed a surreal sight as a hailstorm blanketed their hometowns in white. The intense storm caused traffic disruptions and power outages. The India Meteorological Department has issued a nowcast warning for light to moderate rain, lightning, and gusty winds across Karnataka until March 20.

etimesVideo: This hidden Odisha waterfall is suddenly going viral after Anand Mahindra’s mentionDuduma Falls in Odisha is gaining attention after a post by Anand Mahindra highlighted its natural beauty. Located in the Koraput district, this less-explored waterfall offers a serene escape with its rocky cliffs and surrounding forests. The best time to visit is between October and February for pleasant weather and a steady flow.
